other_observers: Joey Kellner, Joe Roller; Both Joey Kellner and myself found GCTH at this location. This photograph and report is of one of those birds.
specific_location: Private ranch in northern Weld county
description: A Catharus thrush, grayish brown above, whitish below with dark spots on breast. Little buff ground color to breast, with no warm buff to auriculars. Face was cold grayish with very slight grayish eyring. Auriculars looked more fan-like than other Catharus thrushes.Behaviors: Acting thrush-like, spending time on the gound, picking through leaf litter, mostly in shaded areas, occasionally flying up to perch in low limbs in nearby trees, and remaining nearly still when perched.Call: nonePlumage: adult
